untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of an 'eight-bar candle pattern' (a specific multi-bar formation pattern). This pattern recognition capability is not available in the allowed indicators list, which contains only single-bar price properties (body, wick, range) and technical indicators, but no pattern detection or lookback array indexing. The core rule—'eight new price lines formation completed'—cannot be expressed using only the provided indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the intent of the signal (SHORT entry on close below previous close, exit on close above previous close) as a minimal proxy, but this does not represent the actual eight-bar pattern recognition required by the original signal. The pattern definition from the source text is incomplete ('before t...') and lacks specific candle requirements. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic outside the scope of these indicators.
